summary: An attacking 4-3-3 with dangerous movement in behind and a good high-press — but real defensive frailties in build-up and set-play defending.
style: 4-3-3 — fluid movements into wide areas, crosses into the box, dangerous in behind, good structure & high-press.

counterReliance.note: Dangerous in behind off a high press

keyPlayers.name: Mohamed Amoura
keyPlayers.note: Quick, direct dribbler with a great leap and final-third creativity — 11 goal involvements in the Bundesliga, 14 for Algeria in qualifying

tactics: Press high, move fluidly into wide areas, cross and run in behind. If they fix the build-up and set-piece defending frailties, they could really make a stab at this.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
